zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Mortimer於1306年10月6日出生在英國賀福爾維格莫時，他的父親Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March19歲，母親Joan de Geneville20歲。他於1316年6月27日與Elizabeth Badlesmere在英國史洛普爾金萊特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1331年12月16日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯坦頓 武朋 海因 希斯享年25歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Mortimer于1306年10月6日出生在英国賀福爾維格莫时，他的父亲Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March19岁，母亲Joan de Geneville20岁。他于1316年6月27日与Elizabeth Badlesmere在英国史洛普爾金萊特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1331年12月16日在英国英格兰史洛普爾斯坦頓 武朋 海因 希斯享年25岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Mortimer was born on 6 October 1306, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, his father, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, was 19 and his mother, Joan de Geneville, was 20. He married Elizabeth Badlesmere on 27 June 1316, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 16 December 1331, in Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25, and was buried in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Mortimer est né le 6 octobre 1306, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan de Geneville, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Badlesmere le 27 juin 1316, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1331, à Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Mortimer am 6. Oktober 1306 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March 19 und seine Mutter Joan de Geneville 20. Er hat am 27. Juni 1316 in Kinlet, Shropshire, England Elizabeth Badlesmere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. Dezember 1331 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Mortimer è nato il il 6 ottobre 1306 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Geneville, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Badlesmere il 27 giugno 1316, nel Kinlet, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 dicembre 1331, nel Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolto a Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Mortimerが1306年10月6日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of Marchは19歳，母Joan de Genevilleは20歳であった。1316年6月27日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットでElizabeth Badlesmereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1331年12月16日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ウプオン ヒン ヒースで25歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーウィグモー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 업 이인 히스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Mortimer(이)가 1306년 10월 6일 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Geneville(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1316년 6월 27일 영국 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 Elizabeth Badlesmere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1331년 12월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 업 이인 히스에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 위그모어 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Mortimer nasceu em 6 de outubro de 1306, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Geneville, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Badlesmere em 27 de junho de 1316, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1331, em Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Mortimer родился 6 октября 1306 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Geneville, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Badlesmere 27 июня 1316 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 декабря 1331 г. в местности стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности вигмор эбби, вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund Mortimer nació el 6 de octubre de 1306, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Joan de Geneville, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Badlesmere el 27 de junio de 1316, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de diciembre de 1331, en Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultado en Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
